sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, startdate TIMESTAMP, enddate TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, startdate, enddate) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-30 23:59:59', TIMESTAMP '1992-10-01 01:58:00');
SELECT id, datesub('hour', startdate, enddate) AS hour_difference FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET enddate = TIMESTAMP '1992-10-01 02:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, datesub('hour', startdate, enddate) AS updated_hour_difference FROM test_dates;
